chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Appl. No. S- 179 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 21.03.2025 For orders on MA 1881/25 For orders on office objections For orders on MA 1882/25 For hearing of main case Mr. Muhammad Waqar Bhatti, Advocate along with Applicant Applicant Shahid Anwar seeks protective bail in FIR No. 50 of 2025 registered at police station Shaheed FazilRahu for offence punishable under Sections 489-F & 420 PPC. Learned Counsel submits that the Applicant is innocent and has falsely been implicated in this case due to mala fide intention and ulterior motives; that the alleged offence does not fall within the prohibitory clause of Section 497 Cr.P.C.; that the Applicant is law abiding citizen and intends to appear before the Trial Court but he feel apprehension of his arrest at the hands of police in order to humiliate and disgrace him. Without touching merits of the case, the Applicant is granted protective bail for seven days subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.1,00,000/- (One Lac) and PR bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of seven days or whenever he surrenders himself before the Trial Court whichever is earlier. This Cr. Bail Application stands disposed of along with pending applications. JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
